title: Delphinium elatum lusus glabellum
taxonomy: Delphinium elatum lusus glabellum is a variation of the Delphinium elatum plant, and it is classified within the plant family Ranunculaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics, including its flowering patterns and leaf structure. The Delphinium elatum lusus glabellum is further classified within the genus Delphinium, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as larkspurs. The species Delphinium elatum is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and this variation likely shares similar geographical origins. As a specific variation of Delphinium elatum, the classification of Delphinium elatum lusus glabellum is subject to ongoing botanical research and classification updates.
